res_mean_imm_manip_modsel_RVE <- robust(res_mean_imm_manip_modsel, cluster = paperid)

summary(res_mean_imm_manip_modsel_RVE)

imm_manip_candidate.models <- dredge(res_mean_imm_manip_modsel)

imm_manip_subset.models<- subset(imm_manip_candidate.models, delta < 2)
model.sel(imm_manip_subset.models)

#Average models with RVE

mod_imm_manip23 <- rma.mv(yi=yi, V=vi,
                                    random= list(~1|paperid,~1|esid),
                        mods = ~ factor(ecto_endo)+
                          factor(live_nonlive)+
                          factor(developmental_stage),
                        method="ML",
                        sparse=T,
                        data = SMD_imm_manip_compl,
                        test = "t",
                        control=list(optimizer="BFGS"))

mod_imm_manip55 <- rma.mv(yi=yi, V=vi,
                                    random= list(~1|paperid,~1|esid),
               mods = ~ relevel(factor(precopulatory_postcopulatory_traits),ref="precopulatory") +
                 factor(developmental_stage) + 
                 factor(live_nonlive)+
                 factor(ecto_endo),
               method="ML",
               data = SMD_imm_manip_compl,
               sparse=T,
               test="t",
                        control=list(optimizer="BFGS"))

mod_imm_manip24 <- rma.mv(yi=yi, V=vi,
                                    random= list(~1|paperid,~1|esid),
                        mods = ~ factor(ecto_endo)+
                          factor(live_nonlive)+
                          factor(developmental_stage) +
                          factor(contest_scramble),
                        method="ML",
                        sparse=T,
                        data = SMD_imm_manip_compl,
                        test = "t",
                        control=list(optimizer="BFGS"))

mod_imm_manip23_RVE <- robust(mod_imm_manip23, cluster = SMD_imm_manip_compl$paperid)
mod_imm_manip55_RVE <- robust(mod_imm_manip55, cluster = SMD_imm_manip_compl$paperid)
mod_imm_manip24_RVE <- robust(mod_imm_manip24, cluster = SMD_imm_manip_compl$paperid)

modsel_imm_manip_RVE<- model.sel(mod_imm_manip23_RVE,
                   mod_imm_manip24_RVE,
                   mod_imm_manip55_RVE,
                   rank = "AICc")

avg_imm_manip_RVE <- model.avg(modsel_imm_manip_RVE)

summary(avg_imm_manip_RVE)
confint(avg_imm_manip_RVE)

#For reproduction manipulation studies
keepVars_repro <- c("yi", 
              "vi",
              "paperid",
              "esid",
              "female_mating_frequency2",
                "contest_scramble",
                "constitutive_induced")

SMD_repro_manip_compl <- SMD_repro_manip[, keepVars_repro] #dataset with these variables only

SMD_repro_manip_compl <- SMD_repro_manip_compl[complete.cases(SMD_repro_manip_compl),] #removes missing values

res_mean_repro_manip_modsel <- rma.mv(yi=yi, V=vi,
                        random= list(~1|paperid,~1|esid),
                        mods = ~ factor(female_mating_frequency2) +
                          factor(contest_scramble)+
                          factor(constitutive_induced),
                        method="ML",
                        data = SMD_repro_manip_compl,
                        sparse=T,
                        test="t",
                        control=list(optimizer="BFGS"))

repro_manip_candidate.models <- dredge(res_mean_repro_manip_modsel)

repro_manip_subset.models<- subset(repro_manip_candidate.models, delta < 2)
model.sel(repro_manip_subset.models)
# The null model is one of the models that were within 2 AICc points from the best model. We go with the null.

#But let's run the model averaging to see what the results look like 

#Average models with RVE

mod_repro_manip2 <- rma.mv(yi=yi, V=vi,
                        random= list(~1|paperid,~1|esid),
                        mods = ~ factor(constitutive_induced),
                        method="ML",
                        data = SMD_repro_manip_compl,
                        sparse=T,
                        test="t",
                        control=list(optimizer="BFGS"))

mod_repro_manip1 <- rma.mv(yi=yi, V=vi,
                        random= list(~1|paperid,~1|esid),
                        mods = ~1,
                        method="ML",
                        data = SMD_repro_manip_compl,
                        sparse=T,
                        test="t",
                        control=list(optimizer="BFGS"))

mod_repro_manip5 <- rma.mv(yi=yi, V=vi,
                        random= list(~1|paperid,~1|esid),
                        mods = ~ factor(female_mating_frequency2),
                        method="ML",
                        data = SMD_repro_manip_compl,
                        sparse=T,
                        test="t",
                        control=list(optimizer="BFGS"))

mod_repro_manip6 <- rma.mv(yi=yi, V=vi,
                        random= list(~1|paperid,~1|esid),
                        mods = ~ factor(female_mating_frequency2) +
                          factor(constitutive_induced),
                        method="ML",
                        data = SMD_repro_manip_compl,
                        sparse=T,
                        test="t",
                        control=list(optimizer="BFGS"))

mod_repro_manip2_RVE <- robust(mod_repro_manip2, cluster = SMD_repro_manip_compl$paperid)
mod_repro_manip1_RVE <- robust(mod_repro_manip1, cluster = SMD_repro_manip_compl$paperid)
mod_repro_manip5_RVE <- robust(mod_repro_manip5, cluster = SMD_repro_manip_compl$paperid)
mod_repro_manip6_RVE <- robust(mod_repro_manip6, cluster = SMD_repro_manip_compl$paperid)

modsel_repro_manip_RVE<- model.sel(mod_repro_manip2_RVE,
                   mod_repro_manip1_RVE,
                   mod_repro_manip5_RVE,
                   mod_repro_manip6_RVE,
                   rank = "AICc")

avg_repro_manip_RVE <- model.avg(modsel_repro_manip_RVE)

summary(avg_repro_manip_RVE)
confint(avg_repro_manip_RVE)
```

```{r figimmmod, warning=FALSE, fig.cap="Orchard plot of moderator effects for immune challenge experiments by (A) parasite type, (B) challenge type, (C) investment type, (D) female mating frequency, (E) male competition type, and (F) developmental stage at which the immune challenge occurred. In each plot, the circles represent individual effect sizes. Size of each circle represents the sample size for that effect size. The thin lines represent the 95% prediction interval. The rectangles represent the 95% confidence interval. The dots in the middle represent the average effect size.", fig.height = 15, fig.width = 10, dpi=300,fig.align = "center", echo=FALSE}

res_mean_imm_manip_end_ect <- rma.mv(yi=yi, V=vi,  
                        random= list(~1|paperid,~1|esid),
                        mods = ~ factor(ecto_endo), 
                        method="REML",
                        data = SMD_imm_manip, 
                        sparse=T,
                        test="t",
                        control=list(optimizer="BFGS"))

res_mean_imm_manip_end_ect_RVE <- robust(res_mean_imm_manip_end_ect, cluster = SMD_imm_manip$paperid)

end_ect_imm <- orchard_plot(res_mean_imm_manip_end_ect_RVE,
             mod = "ecto_endo",
             xlab=expression("Hedges'"~italic(D)),
             group = "paperid",
             angle = 45,
             legend.pos= c("none"))+
  scale_fill_viridis_d(begin = 0.3, end = 0.8, direction = -1, option="C")+
  scale_colour_viridis_d(begin = 0.3, end = 0.8, direction = -1, option="C")

res_mean_imm_manip_live_nonlive <- rma.mv(yi=yi, V=vi,  
                        random= list(~1|paperid,~1|esid),
                        mods = ~ factor(live_nonlive), 
                        method="REML",
                        data = SMD_imm_manip, 
                        sparse=T,
                        test="t",
                        control=list(optimizer="BFGS"))

res_mean_imm_manip_live_nonlive_RVE <- robust(res_mean_imm_manip_live_nonlive, cluster = SMD_imm_manip$paperid)

live_nonlive_imm <- orchard_plot(res_mean_imm_manip_live_nonlive_RVE,
             mod = "live_nonlive",
             xlab=expression("Hedges'"~italic(D)),
             group = "paperid",
             angle = 45,
             legend.pos= c("none"))+
  scale_fill_viridis_d(begin = 0.3, end = 0.8, direction = -1, option="C")+
  scale_colour_viridis_d(begin = 0.3, end = 0.8, direction = -1, option="C")

res_mean_imm_prepost <- rma.mv(yi=yi, V=vi,  
                        random= list(~1|paperid,~1|esid),
                        mods = ~ factor(precopulatory_postcopulatory_traits), 
                        method="REML",
                        data = SMD_imm_manip, 
                        sparse=T,
                        test="t",
                        control=list(optimizer="BFGS"))

res_mean_imm_prepost_RVE <- robust(res_mean_imm_prepost, cluster = SMD_imm_manip$paperid)

prepost_traits_imm <- orchard_plot(res_mean_imm_prepost_RVE,
             mod = "precopulatory_postcopulatory_traits",
             xlab=expression("Hedges'"~italic(D)),
             group = "paperid",
             angle = 45,
             legend.pos= c("none"))+
  scale_fill_viridis_d(begin = 0.3, end = 0.8, direction = -1, option="C")+
  scale_colour_viridis_d(begin = 0.3, end = 0.8, direction = -1, option="C")+
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("Precopulatory"="Pre-mating", "Postcopulatory" = "Post-mating"))

res_mean_imm_devstg <- rma.mv(yi=yi, V=vi,  
                        random= list(~1|paperid,~1|esid),
                        mods = ~ factor(developmental_stage), 
                        method="REML",
                        data = SMD_imm_manip, 
                        sparse=T,
                        test="t",
                        control=list(optimizer="BFGS"))

res_mean_imm_devstg_RVE <- robust(res_mean_imm_devstg, cluster = SMD_imm_manip$paperid)

devstg_imm <- orchard_plot(res_mean_imm_devstg_RVE,
             mod = "developmental_stage",
             xlab=expression("Hedges'"~italic(D)),
             group = "paperid",
             angle = 45,
             legend.pos= c("none"))+
  scale_fill_viridis_d(begin = 0.3, end = 0.8, direction = -1, option="C")+
  scale_colour_viridis_d(begin = 0.3, end = 0.8, direction = -1, option="C")

res_mean_imm_polyandry <- rma.mv(yi=yi, V=vi,  
                        random= list(~1|paperid,~1|esid),
                        mods = ~ factor(female_mating_frequency2), 
                        method="REML",
                        data = SMD_imm_manip, 
                        sparse=T,
                        test="t",
                        control=list(optimizer="BFGS"))

res_mean_imm_polyandry_RVE <- robust(res_mean_imm_polyandry, cluster = SMD_imm_manip$paperid)

polyandry_imm <- orchard_plot(res_mean_imm_polyandry_RVE,
             mod = "female_mating_frequency2",
             xlab=expression("Hedges'"~italic(D)),
             group = "paperid",
             angle = 45,
             legend.pos= c("none"))+
  scale_fill_viridis_d(begin = 0.3, end = 0.8, direction = -1, option="C")+
  scale_colour_viridis_d(begin = 0.3, end = 0.8, direction = -1, option="C")

res_mean_imm_contscram <- rma.mv(yi=yi, V=vi,  
                        random= list(~1|paperid,~1|esid),
                        mods = ~ factor(contest_scramble), 
                        method="REML",
                        data = SMD_imm_manip, 
                        sparse=T,
                        test="t",
                        control=list(optimizer="BFGS"))

res_mean_imm_contscram_RVE <- robust(res_mean_imm_contscram, cluster = SMD_imm_manip$paperid)

contscram_imm <- orchard_plot(res_mean_imm_contscram_RVE,
             mod = "contest_scramble",
             xlab=expression("Hedges'"~italic(D)),
             group = "paperid",
             angle = 45,
             legend.pos= c("bottom.left"))+
  scale_fill_viridis_d(begin = 0.3, end = 0.8, direction = -1, option="C")+
  scale_colour_viridis_d(begin = 0.3, end = 0.8, direction = -1, option="C")

plot_imm <- end_ect_imm + 
  live_nonlive_imm + 
  prepost_traits_imm + 
  polyandry_imm + 
  contscram_imm + 
  devstg_imm + 
  guide_area() +  plot_annotation(tag_levels = 'A') + 
    plot_layout(widths = c(1, 1),
                guides ="collect",
              design = "
              12
              34
              56
              78
              ") &
  theme(axis.title.x = element_text(size = 15),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 15),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15),
        legend.text =element_text(size = 15),
        legend.title =element_text(size = 15))

plot_imm
```

```{r immmanipparamest, tab.cap="Model parameter estimates for experiments that tested the effects of an immune challenge on reproductive investment.", echo = FALSE, messages = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
res_mean_imm_manip_paramest <- rma.mv(yi=yi, V=vi,  
                        random= list(~1|paperid,~1|esid),
                        method="REML",
                        data = SMD_imm_manip, 
                        sparse=T,
                        test="t",
                        control=list(optimizer="BFGS"))

res_mean_imm_manip_paramest_RVE <- as.data.frame(coef(summary(robust(res_mean_imm_manip_paramest, cluster = SMD_imm_manip$paperid))))

res_mean_imm_manip_end_ect_paramest <- rma.mv(yi=yi, V=vi,  
                        random= list(~1|paperid,~1|esid),
                        mods = ~ factor(ecto_endo)-1, 
                        method="REML",
                        data = SMD_imm_manip, 
                        sparse=T,
                        test="t",
                        control=list(optimizer="BFGS"))

res_mean_imm_manip_end_ect_paramest_RVE <- as.data.frame(coef(summary(robust(res_mean_imm_manip_end_ect_paramest, cluster = SMD_imm_manip$paperid))))

res_mean_imm_manip_live_nonlive_paramest <- rma.mv(yi=yi, V=vi,  
                        random= list(~1|paperid,~1|esid),
                        mods = ~ factor(live_nonlive)-1, 
                        method="REML",
                        data = SMD_imm_manip, 
                        sparse=T,
                        test="t",
                        control=list(optimizer="BFGS"))

res_mean_imm_manip_live_nonlive_paramest_RVE <- as.data.frame(coef(summary(robust(res_mean_imm_manip_live_nonlive_paramest, cluster = SMD_imm_manip$paperid))))

res_mean_imm_prepost_paramest <- rma.mv(yi=yi, V=vi,  
                        random= list(~1|paperid,~1|esid),
                        mods = ~ factor(precopulatory_postcopulatory_traits)-1, 
                        method="REML",
                        data = SMD_imm_manip, 
                        sparse=T,
                        test="t",
                        control=list(optimizer="BFGS"))

res_mean_imm_prepost_paramest_RVE <- as.data.frame(coef(summary(robust(res_mean_imm_prepost_paramest, cluster = SMD_imm_manip$paperid))))

res_mean_imm_devstg_paramest <- rma.mv(yi=yi, V=vi,  
                        random= list(~1|paperid,~1|esid),
                        mods = ~ factor(developmental_stage)-1, 
                        method="REML",
                        data = SMD_imm_manip, 
                        sparse=T,
                        test="t",
                        control=list(optimizer="BFGS"))

res_mean_imm_devstg_paramest_RVE <- as.data.frame(coef(summary(robust(res_mean_imm_devstg_paramest, cluster = SMD_imm_manip$paperid))))

res_mean_imm_polyandry_paramest <- rma.mv(yi=yi, V=vi,  
                        random= list(~1|paperid,~1|esid),
                        mods = ~ factor(female_mating_frequency2)-1, 
                        method="REML",
                        data = SMD_imm_manip, 
                        sparse=T,
                        test="t",
                        control=list(optimizer="BFGS"))

res_mean_imm_polyandry_paramest_RVE <- as.data.frame(coef(summary(robust(res_mean_imm_polyandry_paramest, cluster = SMD_imm_manip$paperid))))

res_mean_imm_contscram_paramest <- rma.mv(yi=yi, V=vi,  
                        random= list(~1|paperid,~1|esid),
                        mods = ~ factor(contest_scramble)-1, 
                        method="REML",
                        data = SMD_imm_manip, 
                        sparse=T,
                        test="t",
                        control=list(optimizer="BFGS"))

res_mean_imm_contscram_paramest_RVE <- as.data.frame(coef(summary(robust(res_mean_imm_contscram_paramest, cluster = SMD_imm_manip$paperid))))

param_mean <- rbind(res_mean_imm_manip_paramest_RVE,
                    res_mean_imm_manip_end_ect_paramest_RVE,
                    res_mean_imm_manip_live_nonlive_paramest_RVE,
                    res_mean_imm_prepost_paramest_RVE, 
                    res_mean_imm_devstg_paramest_RVE, 
                    res_mean_imm_polyandry_paramest_RVE,
                    res_mean_imm_contscram_paramest_RVE) 

rows <- c(1, 3, 5, 8, 10,12)

for (i in rev(rows)) {
  param_mean <- tibble::add_row(param_mean, .after =i)
}

param_mean$term <- c("Overall",
                  "Parasite type",
                  "Ectoparasite",
                  "Endoparasite",
                  "Challenge",
                  "Live",
                  "Non-live",
                  "Investment type",
                  "Both",
                  "Postcopulatory",
                  "Precopulatory",
                  "Developmental stage",
                  "Adult",
                  "Juvenile",
                  "Female mating frequency",
                  "High",
                  "Monogamous/Low",
                  "Male competition type",
                  "Contest",
                  "Scramble")

param_mean <- param_mean[, c(8, 1, 2, 3,4,5,6,7)]

param_mean[2:8] <- lapply(param_mean[2:8], as.numeric)

param_mean <- param_mean %>%
    mutate(pval = case_when(pval < 0.001 ~ '< 0.001',
                            pval >= 0.001 ~ format(round(as.numeric(pval),3),nsmall=3)))

ft_param_mean <- flextable(param_mean) %>% 
  set_header_labels(values = list(
    term = "",
    estimate = "Hedges' D",
    "se" = "se",
    "tval" = "t value",
    "df" = "df",
    "pval" ="p value",
    "ci.lb" ="95% CI lower",
    "ci.ub" ="95% CI upper")) %>% 
  colformat_double(digits = 2) %>% 
  flextable::align(align = "center", part = "header") %>% 
  flextable::align(part = "body", align = "center") %>% 
  flextable::align(j = 1, align = "right") %>% 
  flextable::align(i = c(1,2,5,8,12,15,18),j = 1, align = "left") %>% 
  flextable::delete_columns(j = c('se', 'tval', 'df')) %>% 
  flextable::font(fontname='Times New Roman', part ="all") %>% 
  flextable::autofit()

ft_param_mean
```

```{r figrepromod, warning=FALSE, fig.cap="Orchard plot of moderator effects for reproductive investment manipulation studies by (A) female mating frequency, (B) male competition type, and (C) immune outcome type. In each plot, the circles represent individual effect sizes. Size of each circle represents the sample size for that effect size. The thin lines represent the 95% prediction interval. The rectangles represent the 95% confidence interval. The dots in the middle represent the average effect size.", fig.height = 7, fig.width = 7, dpi=300,fig.align = "center", echo=FALSE}

res_mean_repro_polyandry <- rma.mv(yi=yi, V=vi,  
                        random= list(~1|paperid,~1|esid),
                        mods = ~ factor(female_mating_frequency2), 
                        method="REML",
                        data = SMD_repro_manip, 
                        sparse=T,
                        test="t",
                        control=list(optimizer="BFGS"))

res_mean_repro_polyandry_RVE <- robust(res_mean_repro_polyandry, cluster = SMD_repro_manip$paperid)

polyandry_repro <- orchard_plot(res_mean_repro_polyandry_RVE,
             mod = "female_mating_frequency2",
             xlab=expression("Hedges'"~italic(D)),
             group = "paperid",
             angle = 45,
             legend.pos= c("none")) +
  scale_fill_viridis_d(begin = 0.3, end = 0.8, direction = -1, option="C")+
  scale_colour_viridis_d(begin = 0.3, end = 0.8, direction = -1, option="C")

res_mean_repro_contscram <- rma.mv(yi=yi, V=vi,  
                        random= list(~1|paperid,~1|esid),
                        mods = ~ factor(contest_scramble), 
                        method="REML",
                        data = SMD_repro_manip, 
                        sparse=T,
                        test="t",
                        control=list(optimizer="BFGS"))

res_mean_repro_contscram_RVE <- robust(res_mean_repro_contscram, cluster = SMD_repro_manip$paperid)

contscram_repro <- orchard_plot(res_mean_repro_contscram_RVE,
             mod = "contest_scramble",
             xlab=expression("Hedges'"~italic(D)),
             group = "paperid",
             angle = 45,
             legend.pos= c("none"))+
  scale_fill_viridis_d(begin = 0.3, end = 0.8, direction = -1, option="C")+
  scale_colour_viridis_d(begin = 0.3, end = 0.8, direction = -1, option="C")


res_mean_repro_coninduc <- rma.mv(yi=yi, V=vi,  
                        random= list(~1|paperid,~1|esid),
                        mods = ~ factor(constitutive_induced), 
                        method="REML",
                        data = SMD_repro_manip, 
                        sparse=T,
                        test="t",
                        control=list(optimizer="BFGS"))

res_mean_repro_coninduc_RVE <- robust(res_mean_repro_coninduc, cluster = SMD_repro_manip$paperid)

coninduc_repro <- orchard_plot(res_mean_repro_coninduc_RVE,
             mod = "constitutive_induced",
             xlab=expression("Hedges'"~italic(D)),
             group = "paperid",
             angle = 45)+
  scale_fill_viridis_d(begin = 0.3, end = 0.8, direction = -1, option="C")+
  scale_colour_viridis_d(begin = 0.3, end = 0.8, direction = -1, option="C")

plot_repro<- polyandry_repro + contscram_repro+ coninduc_repro + guide_area() +  plot_annotation(tag_levels = 'A') + 
    plot_layout(widths = c(1, 1),
                guides ="collect",
              design = "
              12
              34
              ") &
  theme(axis.title.x = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
        legend.text =element_text(size = 12),
        legend.title =element_text(size = 12))

plot_repro
```

```{r repromanipparamest, tab.cap="Model parameter estimates for experiments that tested the effect of reproductive investment in immune function.", echo = FALSE, messages = FALSE, warning=FALSE}

res_mean_repro_manip_paramest <- rma.mv(yi=yi, V=vi,  
                        random= list(~1|paperid,~1|esid),
                        method="REML",
                        data = SMD_repro_manip, 
                        sparse=T,
                        test="t",
                        control=list(optimizer="BFGS"))

res_mean_repro_manip_paramest_RVE <- as.data.frame(coef(summary(robust(res_mean_repro_manip_paramest, cluster = SMD_repro_manip$paperid))))

res_mean_repro_polyandry_paramest <- rma.mv(yi=yi, V=vi,  
                        random= list(~1|paperid,~1|esid),
                        mods = ~ factor(female_mating_frequency2)-1, 
                        method="REML",
                        data = SMD_repro_manip, 
                        sparse=T,
                        test="t",
                        control=list(optimizer="BFGS"))

res_mean_repro_polyandry_paramest_RVE <- as.data.frame(coef(summary(robust(res_mean_repro_polyandry_paramest, cluster = SMD_repro_manip$paperid))))

res_mean_repro_contscram_paramest <- rma.mv(yi=yi, V=vi,  
                        random= list(~1|paperid,~1|esid),
                        mods = ~ factor(contest_scramble)-1, 
                        method="REML",
                        data = SMD_repro_manip, 
                        sparse=T,
                        test="t",
                        control=list(optimizer="BFGS"))

res_mean_repro_contscram_paramest_RVE <- as.data.frame(coef(summary(robust(res_mean_repro_contscram_paramest, cluster = SMD_repro_manip$paperid))))

res_mean_repro_coninduc_paramest <- rma.mv(yi=yi, V=vi,  
                        random= list(~1|paperid,~1|esid),
                        mods = ~ factor(constitutive_induced)-1, 
                        method="REML",
                        data = SMD_repro_manip, 
                        sparse=T,
                        test="t",
                        control=list(optimizer="BFGS"))

res_mean_repro_coninduc_paramest_RVE <- as.data.frame(coef(summary(robust(res_mean_repro_coninduc_paramest, cluster = SMD_repro_manip$paperid))))

param_mean_repro <- rbind(res_mean_repro_manip_paramest_RVE,
                          res_mean_repro_polyandry_paramest_RVE,
                          res_mean_repro_contscram_paramest_RVE,
                          res_mean_repro_coninduc_paramest_RVE) 

rows <- c(1, 3, 5)

for (i in rev(rows)) {
  param_mean_repro <- tibble::add_row(param_mean_repro, .after =i)
}

param_mean_repro$term <- c("Overall",
                  "Female mating frequency",
                  "High",
                  "Monogamous/Low",
                  "Male competition type",
                  "Contest",
                  "Scramble",
                  "Immune outcome",
                  "Constitutive",
                  "Induced")

param_mean_repro <- param_mean_repro[, c(8, 1, 2, 3,4,5,6,7)]

param_mean_repro[2:8] <- lapply(param_mean_repro[2:8], as.numeric)

param_mean_repro <- param_mean_repro %>%
    mutate(pval = case_when(pval < 0.001 ~ '< 0.001',
                            pval >= 0.001 ~ format(round(as.numeric(pval),3),nsmall=3)))

ft_param_mean_repro <- flextable(param_mean_repro) %>% 
  set_header_labels(values = list(
    term = "",
    estimate = "Hedges' d",
    "se" = "se",
    "tval" = "t value",
    "df" = "df",
    "pval" ="p value",
    "ci.lb" ="95% CI lower",
    "ci.ub" ="95% CI upper")) %>% 
  colformat_double(digits = 2) %>% 
  flextable::align(align = "center", part = "header") %>% 
  flextable::align(part = "body", align = "center") %>% 
  flextable::align(j = 1, align = "right") %>% 
  flextable::align(i = c(1,2,5,8),j = 1, align = "left") %>% 
  flextable::delete_columns(j = c('se', 'tval', 'df'))%>% 
  flextable::font(fontname='Times New Roman', part ="all") %>% 
  flextable::autofit()

ft_param_mean_repro
```

### Targeted analysis - mixers vs non-mixers

```{r mixers subset, echo = FALSE, results = "hide", messages = FALSE}
#Subset analysis
SMD_postcop <- SMD %>% filter(precopulatory_postcopulatory_traits=="postcopulatory") 

SMD_ejac <- SMD_postcop %>%  filter(SS_assayed!="nuptial gift") %>% 
  filter(SS_assayed!="chemical") 
table(SMD_ejac$SS_assayed)
table(SMD_ejac$precedence)

SMD_ejac$precedence1<-recode(SMD_ejac$precedence,
                     "displacement" = "nonmixing",
                     "mixing"="mixing",
                     "precedence_last"="nonmixing")

#Note analysis had to exclude 1 data point which looked at ejaculate traits in an monogamous species Musca
res_mean_ejac <- rma.mv(yi=yi, V=vi,  
                        random= list(~1|paperid,~1|esid),
                        mods = ~ relevel(factor(precedence1), ref = "mixing"), 
                        method="REML",
                        data = SMD_ejac, 
                        sparse=T,
                        test="t",
                        control=list(optimizer="BFGS"))

summary(res_mean_ejac)

res_mean_ejac_RVE <- robust(res_mean_ejac, cluster = SMD_ejac$paperid)

res_mean_ejac_RVE

res_mean_ejac_paramest <- rma.mv(yi=yi, V=vi,  
                        random= list(~1|paperid,~1|esid),
                        mods = ~ relevel(factor(precedence1), ref = "mixing")-1, 
                        method="REML",
                        data = SMD_ejac, 
                        sparse=T,
                        test="t",
                        control=list(optimizer="BFGS"))

summary(res_mean_ejac_paramest)

res_mean_ejac_paramest_RVE <- robust(res_mean_ejac_paramest, cluster = SMD_ejac$paperid)

res_mean_ejac_paramest_RVE
```

### Targeted analysis - trait type for contest competitiors

```{r contest subset, echo = FALSE, results = "hide", messages = FALSE}
SMD_contest <- SMD %>% filter(contest_scramble=="contest") 

table(SMD_contest$SS_assayed)

SMD_contest$SS_assayed1<-recode(SMD_contest$SS_assayed,
                                "acoustic" = "auditory",
                     "ejaculate"="ejaculate traits",
                     "sperm competitiveness"="ejaculate traits",
                     "reproductive ouput"="reproductive output")

SMD_contest <- SMD_contest %>% filter(SS_assayed1!="ejaculate traits") %>% 
  filter(SS_assayed1!="other") %>% 
  filter(SS_assayed1!="nuptial gift") %>% 
  filter(SS_assayed1!="mating success") %>% 
  filter(SS_assayed1!="reproductive output")%>% 
  filter(SS_assayed1!="attractiveness/unclear modality")%>% 
  filter(SS_assayed1!="mating effort")%>% 
  filter(SS_assayed1!="weapon")

table(SMD_contest$SS_assayed1)

res_mean_contest <- rma.mv(yi=yi, V=vi,  
                        random= list(~1|paperid,~1|esid),
                        mods = ~ relevel(factor(SS_assayed1),ref="dominance"), 
                        method="REML",
                        data = SMD_contest, 
                        sparse=T,
                        test="t")

summary(res_mean_contest)

res_mean_contest_RVE <- robust(res_mean_contest, cluster = paperid)

summary(res_mean_contest_RVE)

res_mean_contest_no_intercept <- rma.mv(yi=yi, V=vi,  
                        random= list(~1|paperid,~1|esid),
                        mods = ~ factor(SS_assayed1)-1, 
                        method="REML",
                        data = SMD_contest, 
                        sparse=T,
                        test="t",
                        control=list(optimizer="BFGS"))

summary(res_mean_contest_no_intercept)

res_mean_contest_no_intercept_RVE <- robust(res_mean_contest_no_intercept, cluster = paperid)

summary(res_mean_contest_no_intercept_RVE)
```

# Publication bias

```{r Pub bias smd, echo = FALSE, results = "hide", messages = FALSE}
SMD_imm_manip$inv_n_tilda <-  with(SMD_imm_manip, (n_control + n_experimental)/(n_control*n_experimental))
SMD_imm_manip$sqrt_inv_n_tilda <-  with(SMD_imm_manip, sqrt(inv_n_tilda))
SMD_imm_manip$centered_year <- with(SMD_imm_manip, scale(year_published,scale=FALSE))

pub_bias_imm_manip <- rma.mv(yi=yi, V=vi,  
                        random= list(~1|paperid,~1|esid),
                        mods = ~ factor(ecto_endo)+
                          factor(live_nonlive)+
                          factor(precopulatory_postcopulatory_traits) +
                          factor(developmental_stage) +
                          factor(contest_scramble)+
                          sqrt_inv_n_tilda+
                          centered_year, 
                        method="REML",
                        test="t", 
                        data = SMD_imm_manip, 
                        sparse=T,
                        control=list(optimizer="BFGS"))

pub_bias_imm_manip_RVE <- robust(pub_bias_imm_manip, cluster=SMD_imm_manip$paperid)

summary(pub_bias_imm_manip_RVE)

SMD_repro_manip$inv_n_tilda <-  with(SMD_repro_manip, (n_control + n_experimental)/(n_control*n_experimental))
SMD_repro_manip$sqrt_inv_n_tilda <-  with(SMD_repro_manip, sqrt(inv_n_tilda))
SMD_repro_manip$centered_year <- with(SMD_repro_manip, scale(year_published,scale=FALSE))

pub_bias_repro_manip <- rma.mv(yi=yi, V=vi,  
                        random= list(~1|paperid,~1|esid),
                        mods = ~ sqrt_inv_n_tilda+
                          centered_year, 
                        method="REML",
                        test="t", 
                        data = SMD_repro_manip, 
                        sparse=T,
                        control=list(optimizer="BFGS"))

pub_bias_repro_manip_RVE <- robust(pub_bias_repro_manip, cluster=SMD_repro_manip$paperid)

summary(pub_bias_repro_manip_RVE)
```

```{r Pub bias cor, echo = FALSE, results = "hide", messages = FALSE}
cor$inv_n_tilda <-  with(cor, 1/(n_correlation))
cor$sqrt_inv_n_tilda <-  with(cor, sqrt(inv_n_tilda))
cor$centered_year <- with(cor, scale(year_published,scale=FALSE))

pub_bias_cor <- rma.mv(yi=yi_zr, V=vi_zr,  
                        random= list(~1|phylogeny,~1|paperid,~1|esid),
                        R= list(phylogeny = cor_tree_cor_binary),
                        mods = ~ sqrt_inv_n_tilda+
                          centered_year, 
                        method="REML",
                        test="t", 
                        data = cor, 
                        sparse=T,
                        control=list(optimizer="BFGS"))

pub_bias_cor_RVE <- robust(pub_bias_cor, cluster=cor$paperid)

summary(pub_bias_cor_RVE)
```

```{r Pub bias smd fig prep, echo = FALSE, results = "hide", messages = FALSE, fig.show='hide'}
res_mean_imm_manip <- rma.mv(yi=yi, V=vi,  
                        random= list(~1|paperid,~1|esid),
                        mods = ~ factor(ecto_endo)+
                          factor(live_nonlive)+
                          factor(precopulatory_postcopulatory_traits) +
                          factor(developmental_stage) +
                          factor(contest_scramble), 
                        method="REML",
                        test="t", 
                        data = SMD_imm_manip, 
                        sparse=T,
                        control=list(optimizer="BFGS"))

funnel(res_mean_imm_manip,yaxis="vinv")

funnel_imm <- recordPlot()

yearREML_imm_fig <- rma.mv(yi=yi, V=vi,  
                        random= list(~1|paperid,~1|esid),
                        mods = ~ year_published, 
                        method="REML",
                        data = SMD_imm_manip,
                        sparse = T,
                        test="t",
                        control=list(optimizer="BFGS"))

yearREML_imm_fig <- robust(yearREML_imm_fig, cluster = SMD_imm_manip$paperid)

year_imm_fig <- bubble_plot(yearREML_imm_fig, mod = "year_published", 
            xlab = "Publication year", ylab = expression("Hedges'"~italic(D)),
            group = "paperid", legend.pos = "none")+ theme(plot.margin = unit(c(1,1,1,1), "cm"))

res_mean_repro_manip <- rma.mv(yi=yi, V=vi,  
                        random= list(~1|paperid,~1|esid),
                        method="REML",
                        test="t", 
                        data = SMD_repro_manip, 
                        sparse=T,
                        control=list(optimizer="BFGS"))

funnel(res_mean_repro_manip,yaxis="vinv", xlab =expression("Hedges'"~italic(D)))

funnel_repro<- recordPlot()

yearREML_repro_fig <- rma.mv(yi=yi, V=vi,  
                        random= list(~1|paperid,~1|esid),
                        mods = ~ year_published, 
                        method="REML",
                        data = SMD_repro_manip,
                        sparse = T,
                        test="t",
                        control=list(optimizer="BFGS"))

yearREML_repro_fig_RVE <- robust(yearREML_repro_fig, cluster = SMD_repro_manip$paperid)

year_repro_fig <- bubble_plot(yearREML_repro_fig_RVE, mod = "year_published", 
            xlab = "Publication year", ylab = expression("Hedges'"~italic(D)),
            group = "paperid",legend.pos = "none")+ theme(plot.margin = unit(c(1,1,1,1), "cm"))
```

```{r smdpubbias, warning=FALSE, fig.cap="Publication bias results for experimental studies: (A) funnel plot of effect size residuals after controlling for the moderators that were retained by our AICc model selection, plotted against the standard error for immune manipulation studies, (B) relationship between year of publication and effect size for immune manipulation studies, (C) funnel plot for reproductive trait manipulation studies (no moderators were included since the null model was regarded as the most parsimonious from our AICc model selection), (D) relationship between year of publication and effect size for reproductive trait manipulation studies.", echo = FALSE, fig.height = 10, fig.width = 10, dpi=300,fig.align = "center"}


plot1<- plot_grid(funnel_imm,                                  
          year_imm_fig, 
          ncol = 2,
          nrow = 1,
          hjust = - 1.5,
          labels = c('A', 'B'))

plot2 <- plot_grid(funnel_repro,
          year_repro_fig,
          ncol = 2,
          nrow = 1,
          hjust = - 1.5,
          labels = c('C', 'D'))

plot_combined <- plot_grid(plot1,
                           NULL,
          plot2,
          ncol = 1,
          nrow = 3,
          rel_heights = c(2,0.4,2))
plot_combined
```

```{r Pub bias cor fig prep, echo = FALSE, results = "hide", messages = FALSE, fig.show='hide'}
res_mean_cor <- rma.mv(yi=yi_zr, V=vi_zr,  
                        random= list(~1|phylogeny,~1|paperid,~1|esid),
                        R= list(phylogeny = cor_tree_cor_binary),
                        method="REML",
                        test="t", 
                        data = cor, 
                        sparse=T,
                        control=list(optimizer="BFGS"))

funnel(res_mean_cor,yaxis="vinv", xlab =expression(italic(Zr)))

funnel_cor <- recordPlot()

yearREML_cor_fig <- rma.mv(yi=yi_zr, V=vi_zr,  
                        random= list(~1|phylogeny, ~1|paperid,~1|esid),
                        R= list(phylogeny = cor_tree_cor_binary),
                        mods = ~ year_published, 
                        method="REML",
                        data = cor,
                        sparse = T,
                        test="t",
                        control=list(optimizer="BFGS"))

yearREML_cor_fig_RVE <- robust(yearREML_cor_fig, cluster = cor$paperid)

year_cor_fig <- bubble_plot(yearREML_cor_fig_RVE, mod = "year_published", 
            xlab = "Publication year", ylab = expression(italic(Zr)),
            group = "paperid",legend.pos = "none")

```

```{r corpubbias, warning=FALSE, fig.cap="Publication bias results for correlational studies: (A) funnel plot of effect size plotted against standard error, (B) relationship between year of publication and effect size.", echo = FALSE, fig.height = 5, fig.width = 10,dpi=300, fig.align = "center"}
plot_grid(funnel_cor,                                  
          year_cor_fig, 
          ncol = 2,
          hjust = - 1.5,
          labels = c('A', 'B'))
```

# Supplementary material

## Supplementary tables

```{r i2manip, tab.cap="I2 heterogeneity accounted for by each random effect for experimental studies", echo = FALSE}
#Check i2 of the random effects 
i2_SMD <- as.data.frame(i2_ml(res1REML_mean))

rownames(i2_SMD) <- c("Total","Phylogeny","Species id","Paper id","Study id","Experiment id","Effect size id")

ft_SMD <- flextable(i2_SMD%>% rownames_to_column("Random effect"))

ft_SMD <- set_header_labels(ft_SMD,
    "i2_ml(res1REML_mean)" = "I2 (%)"
  ) %>%
  colformat_double(digits = 2) %>%
  align(align = "center", part = "all")%>% 
  flextable::font(fontname='Times New Roman', part ="all") %>% 
  flextable::autofit()

ft_SMD
```

```{r i2cor, tab.cap="I2 heterogeneity accounted for by each random effect for correlational studies", echo=FALSE}
#Check i2 of the random effects 
i2_cor<- as.data.frame(i2_ml(res1REML_cor))

rownames(i2_cor) <- c("Total","Phylogeny","Species id","Paper id","Study id","Experiment id","Effect size id")

ft_cor <- flextable(i2_cor%>% rownames_to_column("Random effect"))

ft_cor <- set_header_labels(ft_cor,
    "i2_ml(res1REML_cor)" = "I2 (%)"
  ) %>%
  colformat_double(digits = 2) %>%
align(align = "center", part = "all")%>% 
  flextable::font(fontname='Times New Roman', part ="all") %>% 
  flextable::autofit()

ft_cor
``` 

```{r immmanipmodels, tab.cap="AICc model selection table for experiments that tested the effect of an immune challenge on reproductive investment. Models presented are those that were within 2 AICc points from the best fit model.", echo = FALSE, messages = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
imm_manip_selectmod <- as.data.frame(model.sel(imm_manip_subset.models))

ft_imm_manip_selectmod <- flextable(imm_manip_selectmod) %>% 
  set_header_labels(values = list(
    "(Intercept)" = "Intercept",
    "factor(contest_scramble)" ="Male competition type",
    "factor(developmental_stage)" ="Developmental stage",
    "factor(ecto_endo)" ="Parasite type",
    "factor(live_nonlive)" ="Challenge type",
    'relevel(factor(precopulatory_postcopulatory_traits), ref = "precopulatory")' ="Investment type")) %>% 
  flextable::align(part = "body", align = "center") %>% 
  flextable::font(fontname='Times New Roman', part ="all") %>% 
  flextable::autofit()

ft_imm_manip_selectmod 
```

```{r immmanipselect, tab.cap="Averaged model results from AICc model selection for experiments that tested the effects of an immune challenge on reproductive investment.", echo = FALSE, messages = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
avg_imm_manip_res<-as.data.frame(summary(avg_imm_manip_RVE)$coefmat.subset)
avg_imm_manip_CI<-as.data.frame(confint(avg_imm_manip_RVE))

avg_imm_manip <- cbind(avg_imm_manip_res,
                           avg_imm_manip_CI)

avg_imm_manip$term <- c("Intercept",
                  "Parasite type: Endoparasite",
                  "Challenge type: Non-live",
                  "Developmental stage: Juvenile",
                  "Investment type: Pre- and Post-",
                  "Investment type: Post-mating",
                  "Male competition type: Scramble")

avg_imm_manip <- avg_imm_manip[, c(7, 1, 2, 3,4,5,6)]

avg_imm_manip[2:7] <- lapply(avg_imm_manip[2:7], as.numeric)

ft_avg_imm_manip <- flextable(avg_imm_manip) %>% 
  set_header_labels(values = list(
    term = "",
    "df" = "df",
    "Pr(>|z|)" ="p value",
    "2.5 %" ="95% CI lower",
    "97.5 %" ="95% CI upper")) %>% 
  colformat_double(digits = 2) %>% 
  flextable::align(part = "body", align = "center") %>% 
  flextable::align(j = 1, align = "left") %>% 
  flextable::font(fontname='Times New Roman', part ="all") %>% 
  flextable::autofit()

ft_avg_imm_manip
```

```{r repromanipmodels, tab.cap="AICc model selection table for experiments that tested the effect of reproductive investment on immune function. Models presented are those that were within 2 AICc points from the best fit model.", echo = FALSE, messages = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
repro_manip_selectmod <- as.data.frame(model.sel(repro_manip_subset.models))

ft_repro_manip_selectmod <- flextable(repro_manip_selectmod) %>% 
  set_header_labels(values = list(
    "(Intercept)" = "Intercept",
    "factor(constitutive_induced)" = "Immune outcome",
    "factor(female_mating_frequency2)" ="Female mating frequency")) %>% 
  flextable::align(part = "body", align = "center") %>% 
  flextable::font(fontname='Times New Roman', part ="all") %>% 
  flextable::autofit()

ft_repro_manip_selectmod
```

```{r repromanipselect, tab.cap="Averaged model results from AICc model selection for experiments that tested the effects of reproductive investment on immune function.", echo = FALSE, messages = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
avg_repro_manip_res<-as.data.frame(summary(avg_repro_manip_RVE)$coefmat.subset)
avg_repro_manip_CI<-as.data.frame(confint(avg_repro_manip_RVE))

avg_repro_manip <- cbind(avg_repro_manip_res,
                           avg_repro_manip_CI)

avg_repro_manip$term <- c("Intercept",
                  "Immune outcome: Induced",
                  "Female mating frequency: Low/monogamous")

avg_repro_manip <- avg_repro_manip[, c(7, 1, 2, 3,4,5,6)]

avg_repro_manip[2:7] <- lapply(avg_repro_manip[2:7], as.numeric)

ft_avg_repro_manip <- flextable(avg_repro_manip) %>% 
  set_header_labels(values = list(
    term = "",
    "df" = "df",
    "Pr(>|z|)" ="p value",
    "2.5 %" ="95% CI lower",
    "97.5 %" ="95% CI upper")) %>% 
  colformat_double(digits = 2) %>% 
  flextable::align(part = "body", align = "center") %>% 
  flextable::align(j = 1, align = "left") %>% 
  flextable::font(fontname='Times New Roman', part ="all") %>% 
  flextable::autofit()

ft_avg_repro_manip
```

```{r cormodels, tab.cap="AICc model selection table for correlational studies on the relationship between reproductive investment and immune function. Models presented are those that were within 2 AICc points from the best fit model.", echo = FALSE, messages = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
cor_selectmod <- as.data.frame(model.sel(cor_subset.models))

ft_cor_selectmod <- flextable(cor_selectmod) %>% 
  set_header_labels(values = list(
    "(Intercept)" = "Intercept",
    "factor(constitutive_induced)" = "Immune outcome",
    "factor(contest_scramble)" ="Male competitive type",
    "factor(female_mating_frequency1)" ="Female mating frequency",
    "factor(parasite_vs_immune)" ="Immune vs Parasite measure",
    'relevel(factor(precopulatory_postcopulatory_traits), ref = "postcopulatory")' ="Investment type")) %>% 
  flextable::align(part = "body", align = "center") %>% 
  flextable::font(fontname='Times New Roman', part ="all") %>% 
  flextable::autofit()

ft_cor_selectmod 
```

```{r corpselect, tab.cap="Averaged model results from AICc model selection for correlational studies on the relationship between immune function and reproductive investment.", echo = FALSE, messages = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
avg_cor_res<-as.data.frame(summary(avg_cor_RVE)$coefmat.subset)
avg_cor_CI<-as.data.frame(confint(avg_cor_RVE))

avg_cor <- cbind(avg_cor_res,
                           avg_cor_CI)

avg_cor$term <- c("Intercept",
                  "Immune outcome: Induced",
                  "Male competition type: Scramble",
                  "Female mating frequency: Low/monogamous",
                  "Immune vs parasite measure: Parasite")

avg_cor <- avg_cor[, c(7, 1, 2, 3,4,5,6)]

avg_cor[2:7] <- lapply(avg_cor[2:7], as.numeric)

ft_avg_cor <- flextable(avg_cor) %>% 
  set_header_labels(values = list(
    term = "",
    "df" = "df",
    "Pr(>|z|)" ="p value",
    "2.5 %" ="95% CI lower",
    "97.5 %" ="95% CI upper")) %>% 
  colformat_double(digits = 2) %>% 
  flextable::align(part = "body", align = "center") %>% 
  flextable::align(j = 1, align = "left") %>% 
  flextable::font(fontname='Times New Roman', part ="all") %>% 
  flextable::autofit()

ft_avg_cor 
```

```{r pubbiasimmmanip, tab.cap="Publication bias model results for experiments testing the effect of an immune challenge on reproductive investment.", echo = FALSE, messages = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
pub_bias_imm_manip_RVE_tab <- as.data.frame(coef(summary(robust(pub_bias_imm_manip, cluster=SMD_imm_manip$paperid))))

pub_bias_imm_manip_RVE_tab$term <- c("Intercept",
                  "Parasite type: Endoparasite",
                  "Challenge type: Non-live",
                  "Investment type: Postcopulatory",
                  "Investment type: Precopulatory",
                  "Developmental stage: Juvenile",
                  "Male competition type: Scramble",
                  "√(1/ñ)",
                  "Year of publication")

pub_bias_imm_manip_RVE_tab <- pub_bias_imm_manip_RVE_tab[, c(8, 1, 2, 3,4,5,6,7)]

pub_bias_imm_manip_RVE_tab[2:8] <- lapply(pub_bias_imm_manip_RVE_tab[2:8], as.numeric)

ft_pub_bias_imm_manip_RVE_tab <- flextable(pub_bias_imm_manip_RVE_tab) %>% 
  set_header_labels(values = list(
    term = "",
    "estimate" ="Estimate",
    "se" ="SE",
    "tval" = "t value",
    "df" = "df",
    "pval" ="p value",
    "ci.lb" ="95% CI lower",
    "ci.ub" ="95% CI upper")) %>% 
  colformat_double(digits = 2) %>% 
  flextable::align(part = "body", align = "center") %>% 
  flextable::align(j = 1, align = "left") %>% 
  flextable::font(fontname='Times New Roman', part ="all") %>% 
  flextable::autofit()

ft_pub_bias_imm_manip_RVE_tab 

```

## Supplementary figures

```{r supfigmodelcheckmanip, warning=FALSE, fig.cap="Moderator multicollinearity check for experimental studies testing the effect of (A) immune challenge on reproductive investment and (B) reproductive investment on immune function using Goodman and Kruskal’s τ association scores between categorical variables.", echo = FALSE, fig.height = 30, fig.width = 60,dpi=300, fig.align = "center"}

colnames(GKmatrix_imm_manip) <- c("Parasite type", 
                                    "Challenge type", 
                                    "Investment type", 
                                    "Developmental stage", 
                                    "Species sexual selection mode",
                                  "Female mating frequency",
                                  "Male competition type",
                                  "Order")

rownames(GKmatrix_imm_manip) <- c("Parasite type", 
                                    "Challenge type", 
                                    "Investment type", 
                                    "Developmental stage", 
                                    "Species sexual selection mode",
                                  "Female mating frequency",
                                  "Male competition type",
                                  "Order")
plot(GKmatrix_imm_manip)

colnames(GKmatrix_repro_manip) <- c("Immune measure type", 
                                    "Female mating frequency", 
                                    "Male competition type", 
                                    "Order")

rownames(GKmatrix_repro_manip) <- c("Immune measure type", 
                                    "Female mating frequency", 
                                    "Male competition type", 
                                    "Order")

plot(GKmatrix_repro_manip)

imm_manip_mod <- magick::image_read_pdf(here("figs2a.pdf"))

imm_manip_mod <- image_annotate(imm_manip_mod, "(A)", size =  10, gravity = "NorthWest", color = "black")

repro_manip_mod <- magick::image_read_pdf(here("figs2b.pdf"))

repro_manip_mod <- image_annotate(repro_manip_mod, "(B)", size =  10, gravity = "NorthWest", color = "black")

comb_mod <- c(imm_manip_mod, repro_manip_mod)

image_append(image_scale(comb_mod, "x2000"))

comb_mod_pdf <-image_append(image_scale(comb_mod, "x2000"))

image_write(comb_mod_pdf , path = "figsupp2.pdf", format = "pdf")


```

```{r supfigmodelcheckcor, warning=FALSE, fig.cap="Moderator multicollinearity check for correlational studies using Goodman and Kruskal’s τ association scores between categorical variables.", echo = FALSE, fig.height = 30, fig.width = 30,dpi=300, fig.align = "center"}
plot(GKmatrix_cor)
colnames(GKmatrix_cor) <- c("Investment type", 
                                    "Immune measure type", 
                                    "Species sexual selection mode", 
                                    "Female mating frequency", 
                                    "Male competition type",
                                  "Order",
                                  "Immune vs parasite measure")

rownames(GKmatrix_cor) <- c("Investment type", 
                                    "Immune measure type", 
                                    "Species sexual selection mode", 
                                    "Female mating frequency", 
                                    "Male competition mode",
                                  "Order",
                                  "Immune vs parasite measure")

cor_mod <- magick::image_read_pdf(here("GKmatrix_cor.pdf"))

image_append(image_scale(cor_mod, "x2000"))

```

## Supplementary results

```{r SMD main moderator with year, echo = FALSE, results = "hide", messages = FALSE}
eval(metafor:::.MuMIn)

keepVars <- c("yi", 
              "vi",
              "paperid",
              "esid",
              "ecto_endo",
                "live_nonlive",
                "precopulatory_postcopulatory_traits",
                "developmental_stage",
                "female_mating_frequency2",
                "contest_scramble",
              "centered_year")

SMD_imm_manip_compl <- SMD_imm_manip[, keepVars] #dataset with these variables only

SMD_imm_manip_compl <- SMD_imm_manip_compl[complete.cases(SMD_imm_manip_compl),] #removes missing values


res_mean_imm_manip_modsel <- rma.mv(yi=yi, V=vi,
                                    random= list(~1|paperid,~1|esid),
                        mods = ~ factor(ecto_endo)+
                          factor(live_nonlive)+
                          relevel(factor(precopulatory_postcopulatory_traits),ref="precopulatory") +
                          factor(developmental_stage) +
                          factor(female_mating_frequency2) +
                          factor(contest_scramble)+
                          centered_year,
                        method="ML",
                        sparse=T,
                        data = SMD_imm_manip_compl,
                        test = "t",
                        control=list(optimizer="BFGS"))

res_mean_imm_manip_modsel_RVE <- robust(res_mean_imm_manip_modsel, cluster = paperid)

summary(res_mean_imm_manip_modsel_RVE)

imm_manip_candidate.models <- dredge(res_mean_imm_manip_modsel)

imm_manip_subset.models_year<- subset(imm_manip_candidate.models, delta < 2)
model.sel(imm_manip_subset.models_year)

#Average models with RVE

mod_imm_manip46 <- rma.mv(yi=yi, V=vi,
                                    random= list(~1|paperid,~1|esid),
                        mods = ~ factor(ecto_endo)+
                          factor(live_nonlive)+
                          factor(developmental_stage)+
                          centered_year,
                        method="ML",
                        sparse=T,
                        data = SMD_imm_manip_compl,
                        test = "t",
                        control=list(optimizer="BFGS"))

mod_imm_manip110 <- rma.mv(yi=yi, V=vi,
                                    random= list(~1|paperid,~1|esid),
               mods = ~ relevel(factor(precopulatory_postcopulatory_traits),ref="precopulatory") +
                 factor(developmental_stage) + 
                 factor(live_nonlive)+
                 factor(ecto_endo)+
                          centered_year,
               method="ML",
               data = SMD_imm_manip_compl,
               sparse=T,
               test="t",
                        control=list(optimizer="BFGS"))

mod_imm_manip62 <- rma.mv(yi=yi, V=vi,
                                    random= list(~1|paperid,~1|esid),
               mods = ~ factor(developmental_stage) + 
                 factor(live_nonlive)+
                 factor(ecto_endo)+
                          factor(female_mating_frequency2)+
                          centered_year,
               method="ML",
               data = SMD_imm_manip_compl,
               sparse=T,
               test="t",
                        control=list(optimizer="BFGS"))



mod_imm_manip42 <- rma.mv(yi=yi, V=vi,
                                    random= list(~1|paperid,~1|esid),
                        mods = ~ factor(live_nonlive)+
                 factor(ecto_endo)+
                          centered_year,
                        method="ML",
                        sparse=T,
                        data = SMD_imm_manip_compl,
                        test = "t",
                        control=list(optimizer="BFGS"))



mod_imm_manip48 <- rma.mv(yi=yi, V=vi,
                                    random= list(~1|paperid,~1|esid),
                        mods = ~ factor(ecto_endo)+
                          factor(live_nonlive)+
                          factor(developmental_stage) +
                          factor(contest_scramble)+
                          centered_year,
                        method="ML",
                        sparse=T,
                        data = SMD_imm_manip_compl,
                        test = "t",
                        control=list(optimizer="BFGS"))



mod_imm_manip46_RVE <- robust(mod_imm_manip46, cluster = SMD_imm_manip_compl$paperid)
mod_imm_manip42_RVE <- robust(mod_imm_manip42, cluster = SMD_imm_manip_compl$paperid)
mod_imm_manip62_RVE <- robust(mod_imm_manip62, cluster = SMD_imm_manip_compl$paperid)
mod_imm_manip110_RVE <- robust(mod_imm_manip110, cluster = SMD_imm_manip_compl$paperid)
mod_imm_manip48_RVE <- robust(mod_imm_manip48, cluster = SMD_imm_manip_compl$paperid)

modsel_imm_manip_RVE_year<- model.sel(mod_imm_manip46_RVE,
                   mod_imm_manip42_RVE,
                   mod_imm_manip62_RVE,
                   mod_imm_manip110_RVE,
                   mod_imm_manip48_RVE,
                   rank = "AICc")

avg_imm_manip_RVE_year <- model.avg(modsel_imm_manip_RVE_year)

summary(avg_imm_manip_RVE_year)
confint(avg_imm_manip_RVE_year)

#For reproduction manipulation studies
keepVars_repro <- c("yi", 
              "vi",
              "paperid",
              "esid",
              "female_mating_frequency2",
                "contest_scramble",
                "constitutive_induced",
              "centered_year")

SMD_repro_manip_compl <- SMD_repro_manip[, keepVars_repro] #dataset with these variables only

SMD_repro_manip_compl <- SMD_repro_manip_compl[complete.cases(SMD_repro_manip_compl),] #removes missing values

res_mean_repro_manip_modsel <- rma.mv(yi=yi, V=vi,
                        random= list(~1|paperid,~1|esid),
                        mods = ~ factor(female_mating_frequency2) +
                          factor(contest_scramble)+
                          factor(constitutive_induced)+
                          centered_year,
                        method="ML",
                        data = SMD_repro_manip_compl,
                        sparse=T,
                        test="t",
                        control=list(optimizer="BFGS"))

repro_manip_candidate.models <- dredge(res_mean_repro_manip_modsel)

repro_manip_subset.models_year<- subset(repro_manip_candidate.models, delta < 2)
model.sel(repro_manip_subset.models_year)

#Average models with RVE

mod_repro_manip2 <- rma.mv(yi=yi, V=vi,
                        random= list(~1|paperid,~1|esid),
                        mods = ~ centered_year,
                        method="ML",
                        data = SMD_repro_manip_compl,
                        sparse=T,
                        test="t",
                        control=list(optimizer="BFGS"))

mod_repro_manip4 <- rma.mv(yi=yi, V=vi,
                        random= list(~1|paperid,~1|esid),
                        mods = ~ factor(constitutive_induced)+
                          centered_year,
                        method="ML",
                        data = SMD_repro_manip_compl,
                        sparse=T,
                        test="t",
                        control=list(optimizer="BFGS"))

mod_repro_manip2_RVE <- robust(mod_repro_manip2, cluster = SMD_repro_manip_compl$paperid)
mod_repro_manip4_RVE <- robust(mod_repro_manip4, cluster = SMD_repro_manip_compl$paperid)

modsel_repro_manip_RVE_year<- model.sel(mod_repro_manip2_RVE,
                   mod_repro_manip4_RVE,
                   rank = "AICc")

avg_repro_manip_RVE_year <- model.avg(modsel_repro_manip_RVE_year)

summary(avg_repro_manip_RVE_year)
confint(avg_repro_manip_RVE_year)
```

```{r immmanipmodelsyear, tab.cap="AICc model selection table for experiments that tested the effect of an immune challenge on reproductive investment repeated with year of publication included. Models presented are those that were within 2 AICc points from the best fit model.", echo = FALSE, messages = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
imm_manip_selectmod_year <- as.data.frame(model.sel(imm_manip_subset.models_year))

ft_imm_manip_selectmod_year <- flextable(imm_manip_selectmod_year) %>% 
  set_header_labels(values = list(
    "(Intercept)" = "Intercept",
    "centered_year" = "Year of publication",
    "factor(contest_scramble)" ="Male competition type",
    "factor(developmental_stage)" ="Developmental stage",
    "factor(ecto_endo)" ="Parasite type",
    "factor(female_mating_frequency2)" ="Female mating frequency",
    "factor(live_nonlive)" ="Challenge type",
    'relevel(factor(precopulatory_postcopulatory_traits), ref = "precopulatory")' ="Investment type")) %>% 
  flextable::align(part = "body", align = "center") %>% 
  flextable::font(fontname='Times New Roman', part ="all") %>% 
  flextable::autofit()

ft_imm_manip_selectmod_year 
```

```{r supimmmanipselect, tab.cap="Averaged model results from AICc model selection for experiments that tested the effects of an immune challenge on reproductive investment repeated with year of publication included as a potential moderator.", echo = FALSE, messages = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
avg_imm_manip_year_res<-as.data.frame(summary(avg_imm_manip_RVE_year)$coefmat.subset)
avg_imm_manip_year_CI<-as.data.frame(confint(avg_imm_manip_RVE_year))

avg_imm_manip_year <- cbind(avg_imm_manip_year_res,
                           avg_imm_manip_year_CI)

avg_imm_manip_year$term <- c("Intercept",
                  "Parasite type:Endoparasite",
                  "Challenge type:Non-live",
                  "Developmental stage: Juvenile",
                  "Year of publication",
                  "Investment type: Pre- and Post-",
                  "Investment type: Post-mating",
                  "Female mating frequency: Monogamous/Low",
                  "Male competition type: Scramble")

avg_imm_manip_year <- avg_imm_manip_year[, c(7, 1, 2, 3,4,5,6)]

avg_imm_manip_year[2:7] <- lapply(avg_imm_manip_year[2:7], as.numeric)

ft_avg_imm_manip_year <- flextable(avg_imm_manip_year) %>% 
  set_header_labels(values = list(
    term = "",
    "df" = "df",
    "Pr(>|z|)" ="p value",
    "2.5 %" ="95% CI lower",
    "97.5 %" ="95% CI upper")) %>% 
  colformat_double(digits = 2) %>% 
  flextable::align(part = "body", align = "center") %>% 
  flextable::align(j = 1, align = "left") %>% 
  flextable::font(fontname='Times New Roman', part ="all") %>% 
  flextable::autofit()

ft_avg_imm_manip_year 
```

```{r repromanipmodelsyear, tab.cap="AICc model selection table for experiments that tested the effect of reproductive investment on immune function repeated with year of publication included. Models presented are those that were within 2 AICc points from the best fit model.", echo = FALSE, messages = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
repro_manip_selectmod_year <- as.data.frame(model.sel(repro_manip_subset.models_year))

ft_repro_manip_selectmod_year <- flextable(repro_manip_selectmod_year) %>% 
  set_header_labels(values = list(
    "(Intercept)" = "Intercept",
    "centered_year" = "Year of publication",
    "factor(constitutive_induced)" = "Immune outcome")) %>% 
  flextable::align(part = "body", align = "center") %>% 
  flextable::font(fontname='Times New Roman', part ="all") %>% 
  flextable::autofit()

ft_repro_manip_selectmod_year
```

```{r suprepromanipselect, tab.cap="Averaged model results from AICc model selection for experiments that tested the effects of reproductive investment on immune function repeated with year of publication included as a potential moderator.", echo = FALSE, messages = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
avg_repro_manip_year_res<-as.data.frame(summary(avg_repro_manip_RVE_year)$coefmat.subset)
avg_repro_manip_year_CI<-as.data.frame(confint(avg_repro_manip_RVE_year))

avg_repro_manip_year <- cbind(avg_repro_manip_year_res,
                           avg_repro_manip_year_CI)

avg_repro_manip_year$term <- c("Intercept",
                  "Year of publication",
                  "Immune outcome: Induced")

avg_repro_manip_year <- avg_repro_manip_year[, c(7, 1, 2, 3,4,5,6)]

avg_repro_manip_year[2:7] <- lapply(avg_repro_manip_year[2:7], as.numeric)

ft_avg_repro_manip_year <- flextable(avg_repro_manip_year) %>% 
  set_header_labels(values = list(
    term = "",
    "df" = "df",
    "Pr(>|z|)" ="p value",
    "2.5 %" ="95% CI lower",
    "97.5 %" ="95% CI upper")) %>% 
  colformat_double(digits = 2) %>% 
  flextable::align(part = "body", align = "center") %>% 
  flextable::align(j = 1, align = "left") %>% 
  flextable::font(fontname='Times New Roman', part ="all") %>% 
  flextable::autofit()

ft_avg_repro_manip_year
```
